pageInfo.pagePurpose: To inform prospective customers, specifically Indian businesses, about the features, pricing, and benefits of Zoho Inventory software, and to persuade them to sign up, watch a demo, or contact sales.

businessEntities.name: Inventory
evidence: Inventory management software designed for Indian businesses

businessEntities.name: Order
evidence: Manage and fulfill orders on the go

businessEntities.name: Customer
evidence: Here's what a few of our Indian customers have to say about us

businessEntities.name: Shipment
evidence: We have partnered with the best shipping carriers

forms.purpose: To allow users to search the Zoho website for information about products, solutions, and resources.

fields.businessMeaning: The search term entered by the user.

forms.purpose: To capture user inquiries for sales or support, creating a 'case' in Zoho's system.

fields.businessMeaning: The user's email address for contact.
The user's phone number for contact.
The user's specific question or message.

forms.purpose: To allow users to request a scheduled demonstration or consultation by submitting their contact information and availability.

fields.businessMeaning: The user's email address for contact.
The user's phone number for contact.
The user's preferred date and time for a call or demo.
A description of the user's business needs or what they want to see in a demo.
A CAPTCHA field to prevent spam submissions.

workflows.name: User Sign-up
steps: User clicks on a 'Sign Up Now', 'GET STARTED', or 'SIGN UP FOR FREE' link.
User is navigated to a registration page to create a new Zoho Inventory account.

workflows.name: Explore Demo Account
steps: User clicks the 'Explore demo account' or 'EXPLORE DEMO ACCOUNT' link.
User is navigated to a live, pre-populated demo version of the Zoho Inventory application to explore its features.

workflows.name: Request a Call or Demo
steps: User clicks 'Schedule a call' or fills out the contact form with their name, email, phone, and requirements.
A case is created for the Zoho sales or support team to follow up with the user.

workflows.name: User Sign-in
steps: An existing user clicks the 'Sign In' link.
The user is redirected to the Zoho account login page to enter their credentials.

workflows.name: Manage Cookie Preferences
steps: User is presented with a cookie banner.
User can choose to 'Accept All Cookies', 'Reject Unnecessary Cookies', or click 'Manage Cookies'.
If 'Manage Cookies' is clicked, a detailed preference center is shown.
User adjusts settings and clicks 'Save & Exit'.

userGoals.name: Evaluate the suitability of the software
userGoals.goal: I want to understand the features, integrations, and pricing of Zoho Inventory to see if it meets my business needs.
evidence: h2: What makes Zoho Inventory GST Compliant

userGoals.name: Sign up for the service
userGoals.goal: I want to create an account and start using Zoho Inventory, preferably for free initially.

userGoals.name: Try the software before committing
userGoals.goal: I want to see how the software works and looks without having to sign up for a full account yet.

userGoals.name: Get specific questions answered by a person
userGoals.goal: I have questions about the software and want to talk to a sales or support representative.

userGoals.name: Find learning and support resources
userGoals.goal: I want to find help documentation, guides, or tutorials on how to use the software.

predictedMissingUI.reason: The 'Watch the demo' button implies a video player will appear, likely in a modal, but no such element is described in the provided facts.
Multiple 'Sign Up' links point to a registration page, but the form itself is not on this page.
The 'Sign In' link points to a login page, but the login form is not on this page.
After submitting one of the contact/demo forms, a user would expect a 'Thank you' or confirmation message, which is not part of this page's structure.
The 'Manage Cookies' button implies a detailed interface with toggles for different cookie categories (Functional, Analytics, etc.), which is only partially described by the headings and buttons.

pageNarrative: This is a comprehensive marketing landing page for Zoho Inventory, specifically tailored for businesses in India. The page highlights key features such as GST compliance, order and warehouse management, integrations, and barcode scanning. It aims to build trust through customer testimonials and by listing partnered shipping carriers. The user's primary journey is to learn about the product through feature lists and demos, understand its value via pricing and customer stories, and ultimately convert by signing up for a free trial or paid plan or by contacting a sales representative.
